title: Jacksonville Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Jacksonville with a Z-Score of +4.26. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching critical levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Jacksonville has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. The Z-Score of +4.26 indicates a significant anomaly from the average temperature. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 13.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 41% and the wind speed is at 19.9 km/h, which may provide some relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
